---
name: New persona / enhancement
about: Propose a new persona, or an enhancement to an existing persona or skill
title: "[persona] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The lens

What domain or perspective does this persona bring that the current set
(Python/FastAPI, SQL/Postgres, security, accessibility, design, UX) doesn't
already cover?

## What it would check

The concrete checklist — the high-value, easy-to-miss issues this persona would
catch. Be specific; grounded checks beat vague "reviews quality."

## Code auditor or browser critic?

- [ ] Code auditor (reads files — part of `/personas:audit`)
- [ ] Browser critic (drives a live URL via Playwright — part of `/personas:panel`)

## Anything else

Prior art, references, or an example of a finding it would surface.
